message.content: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>
der reader download sollte keine text datei sein sondern eine 1 zu 1 Html datei mit styles die genauso aussieht wie in der reader ansicht

content.text: Lass mich zuerst den aktuellen Reader-Download und die Reader-Ansicht verstehen.

input.prompt:
Find all code related to:
1. The "Reader" view/component - how it renders conversations visually (look for reader-related components, styles, CSS)
2. The Reader download/export functionality - how the download is triggered and what format it produces

Search thoroughly in apps/web/src/ for anything related to "reader", "download", "export". Also check for format types and export handlers.

Report:
- Which files implement the Reader view and its styling
- Which files handle the Reader download
- How the download currently works (what format, what content)
- What CSS/styles are used in the Reader view

1→import type {
     2→  FormatRule,
     3→  FormatRuleKind,
     4→  ImportStage,
     5→} from "@chat-exporter/shared";
     6→
     7→import type { ViewMode } from "@/components/format-workspace/types";
     8→
     9→const viewLabels: Record<ViewMode, string> = {
    10→  reader: "Reader",
    11→  markdown: "Markdown",
    12→  handover: "Übergabe",
    13→  json: "JSON",
    14→};
    15→
    16→const roleLabels: Record<string, string> = {
    17→  assistant: "Assistent",
    18→  markdown: "Markdown",
    19→  system: "System",
    20→  tool: "Werkzeug",
    21→  user: "Nutzer",
    22→};
    23→
    24→const blockTypeLabels: Record<string, string> = {
    25→  code: "Codeblock",
    26→  heading: "Überschrift",
    27→  list: "Liste",
    28→  "markdown-lines": "Markdown-Zeilen",
    29→  paragraph: "Absatz",
    30→  quote: "Zitat",
    31→  table: "Tabelle",
    32→};
    33→
    34→const ruleKindLabels: Record<FormatRuleKind, string> = {
    35→  clipboard: "Zwischenablage",
    36→  export_profile: "Export-Profil",
    37→  inline_semantics: "Inline-Semantik",
    38→  render: "Darstellung",
    39→  structure: "Struktur",
    40→};
    41→
    42→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    43→// Job Status Labels
    44→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    45→
    46→const jobStatusLabels: Record<string, string> = {
    47→  completed: "Bereit",
    48→  failed: "Fehlgeschlagen",
    49→  queued: "Warteschlange",
    50→  processing: "Import läuft",
    51→};
    52→
    53→export function getJobStatusLabel(status: string) {
    54→  return jobStatusLabels[status] ?? jobStatusLabels.processing;
    55→}
    56→
    57→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    58→// Import Stage Labels
    59→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    60→
    61→const importStageLabels: Record<
    62→  ImportStage | "queued",
    63→  { label: string; detail: string }
    64→> = {
    65→  queued: {
    66→    label: "Wartet auf Start",
    67→    detail:
    68→      "Der Job ist in der Warteschlange und startet, sobald ein Worker frei ist.",
    69→  },
    70→  validate: {
    71→    label: "Link wird geprüft",
    72→    detail: "Der Link wird geprüft und dem passenden Importer zugeordnet.",
    73→  },
    74→  fetch: {
    75→    label: "Seite wird geladen",
    76→    detail: "Die freigegebene Seite wird geöffnet und als Quelle erfasst.",
    77→  },
    78→  extract: {
    79→    label: "Nachrichten werden extrahiert",
    80→    detail: "Die Unterhaltung wird aus dem Markup des Anbieters extrahiert.",
    81→  },
    82→  normalize: {
    83→    label: "Transkript wird bereinigt",
    84→    detail: "Rohfragmente werden in lesbare Nachrichten umgewandelt.",
    85→  },
    86→  structure: {
    87→    label: "Struktur wird repariert",
    88→    detail: "Abschnitte mit zusätzlichem Bereinigungsbedarf werden korrigiert.",
    89→  },
    90→  render: {
    91→    label: "Ausgaben werden erzeugt",
    92→    detail: "Reader- und Exportformate werden vorbereitet.",
    93→  },
    94→  done: {
    95→    label: "Bereit",
    96→    detail: "Das Transkript ist bereit.",
    97→  },
    98→};
    99→
   100→export function getImportStageLabel(stage: ImportStage | "queued") {
   101→  return importStageLabels[stage]?.label ?? stage;
   102→}
   103→
   104→export function getImportStageDescription(stage: ImportStage | "queued") {
   105→  return importStageLabels[stage]?.detail ?? "";
   106→}
   107→
   108→export function getImportStageEntry(stage: ImportStage | "queued") {
   109→  return importStageLabels[stage] ?? { label: stage, detail: "" };
   110→}
   111→
   112→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   113→// Adjustment UI Labels
   114→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   115→
   116→export const adjustmentLabels = {
   117→  // Button labels
   118→  send: "Senden",
   119→  sendPending: "Wird gesendet...",
   120→  cancel: "Abbrechen",
   121→  discard: "Verwerfen",
   122→  dismiss: "Verstanden",
   123→  download: "Download",
   124→
   125→  // Placeholders
   126→  adjustmentPlaceholder: "Beschreibe kurz, wie diese Stelle aussehen soll.",
   127→  followUpPlaceholder: "Noch etwas anpassen?",
   128→
   129→  // Messages
   130→  loadingMessage: "Ich bereite diese Stelle gerade für die Anpassung vor.",
   131→  appliedHint:
   132→    "Die Änderung ist schon sichtbar. Du kannst weiter anpassen oder eine neue Stelle markieren.",
   133→  defaultHint:
   134→    "Die KI antwortet kurz und setzt klare Änderungen sofort direkt in dieser Ansicht um.",
   135→  closeLabel: "Anpassung schließen",
   136→  createRuleLabel: "Regel erstellen",
   137→  inputLabel: "Anpassungsanfrage",
   138→
   139→  // Guide
   140→  guideInstruction:
   141→    "Markiere die Stelle, die anders aussehen soll. Beschreibe dann kurz deinen Wunsch, und die Änderung erscheint direkt hier.",
   142→  guideNote: "Du musst kein Regel-JSON lesen oder eine Vorschau vergleichen.",
   143→
   144→  // Mode toggle
   145→  endAdjustMode: "Anpassungsmodus beenden",
   146→
   147→  // Edit mode
   148→  edit: "Bearbeiten",
   149→  endEdit: "Bearbeitung beenden",
   150→
   151→  // Clipboard
   152→  copied: "Kopiert!",
   153→
   154→  // Toolbar actions
   155→  versions: "Versionen",
   156→  downloadAction: "Herunterladen",
   157→} as const;
   158→
   159→export function getAdjustViewLabel(view: ViewMode) {
   160→  return `${getViewLabel(view)} anpassen`;
   161→}
   162→
   163→export function getEndAdjustLabel() {
   164→  return adjustmentLabels.endAdjustMode;
   165→}
   166→
   167→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   168→// View Labels
   169→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   170→
   171→export function getViewLabel(view: ViewMode) {
   172→  return viewLabels[view];
   173→}
   174→
   175→export function getRoleLabel(role: string) {
   176→  return roleLabels[role] ?? role;
   177→}
   178→
   179→export function getBlockTypeLabel(blockType: string) {
   180→  return blockTypeLabels[blockType] ?? blockType;
   181→}
   182→
   183→export function getRuleKindLabel(kind: FormatRuleKind) {
   184→  return ruleKindLabels[kind];
   185→}
   186→
   187→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   188→// Selection Formatter
   189→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   190→
   191→export function formatMarkdownLinesLabel(start: number, end: number) {
   192→  return `Markdown-Zeilen ${start}-${end}`;
   193→}
   194→
   195→export function formatMessageBlockLabel(
   196→  role: string,
   197→  index: number,
   198→  blockType: string,
   199→) {
   200→  return `${getRoleLabel(role)}-Nachricht ${index} · ${getBlockTypeLabel(blockType)}`;
   201→}
   202→
   203→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   204→// Rules Labels
   205→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   206→
   207→export const rulesLabels = {
   208→  activeRulesCount: (count: number) =>
   209→    count > 0 ? `${count} ${count === 1 ? "Regel" : "Regeln"} aktiv` : "Regeln",
   210→  noActiveRules: "Keine aktiven Regeln.",
   211→  allImports: "Für alle Imports",
   212→  thisImportOnly: "Nur dieser Import",
   213→  loading: "Wird geladen...",
   214→  rationale: "Begründung",
   215→  defaultRationale:
   216→    "Diese Regel wurde aus einer früheren Anpassungssession für diesen Import erzeugt.",
   217→  exactScopeNote: "Diese Regel gilt nur für die ursprüngliche Auswahl.",
   218→  globalScopeNote: "Diese Regel gilt für alle Imports in diesem Format.",
   219→  undoPending: "Wird rückgängig gemacht...",
   220→  undo: "Rückgängig",
   221→} as const;
   222→
   223→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   224→// Loading & Misc Labels
   225→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   226→
   227→export const miscLabels = {
   228→  transcriptLoading: "Transkript wird vorbereitet",
   229→  importFailed: "Import fehlgeschlagen",
   230→  errorInPhase: (phase: string) => `Fehler in Phase: ${phase}`,
   231→  viewLoadError: "Diese Ansicht konnte nicht geladen werden.",
   232→  retryButton: "Erneut versuchen",
   233→  adjustmentLoadError: "Anpassungen konnten nicht geladen werden.",
   234→} as const;
   235→
   236→export function getRuleLabel(rule: FormatRule) {
   237→  const summary = rule.instruction.trim();
   238→
   239→  if (summary.length <= 72) {
   240→    return summary;
   241→  }
   242→
   243→  return `${summary.slice(0, 69).trimEnd()}...`;
   244→}
   245→

1→import { z } from "zod";
     2→
     3→import { roleSchema } from "./conversation.js";
     4→
     5→export const adjustmentTargetFormatSchema = z.enum([
     6→  "reader",
     7→  "markdown",
     8→  "handover",
     9→  "json",
    10→  "html",
    11→  "rich_text",
    12→  "clipboard_html",
    13→]);
    14→
    15→export const adjustmentSessionStatusSchema = z.enum([
    16→  "open",
    17→  "applied",
    18→  "discarded",
    19→  "failed",
    20→]);
    21→
    22→export const formatRuleKindSchema = z.enum([
    23→  "structure",
    24→  "inline_semantics",
    25→  "render",
    26→  "export_profile",
    27→  "clipboard",
    28→]);
    29→
    30→export const formatRuleScopeSchema = z.enum([
    31→  "import_local",
    32→  "format_profile",
    33→  "workspace_global",
    34→]);
    35→
    36→export const formatRuleStatusSchema = z.enum([
    37→  "draft",
    38→  "active",
    39→  "disabled",
    40→  "rejected",
    41→]);
    42→
    43→export const adjustmentEventTypeSchema = z.enum([
    44→  "session_created",
    45→  "clarification_requested",
    46→  "preview_generated",
    47→  "preview_failed",
    48→  "rule_applied",
    49→  "rule_disabled",
    50→  "rule_promoted",
    51→  "session_discarded",
    52→  "message_deleted",
    53→  "round_deleted",
    54→  "message_restored",
    55→]);
    56→
    57→export const adjustmentSelectionSchema = z.object({
    58→  blockIndex: z.number().int().nonnegative(),
    59→  blockType: z.string(),
    60→  lineEnd: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
    61→  lineStart: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
    62→  messageId: z.string(),
    63→  messageIndex: z.number().int().nonnegative(),
    64→  messageRole: z.string(),
    65→  selectedText: z.string(),
    66→  textQuote: z.string(),
    67→});
    68→
    69→export const createAdjustmentSessionRequestSchema = z.object({
    70→  selection: adjustmentSelectionSchema,
    71→  targetFormat: adjustmentTargetFormatSchema,
    72→});
    73→
    74→export const appendAdjustmentMessageRequestSchema = z.object({
    75→  content: z.string().trim().min(1),
    76→});
    77→
    78→// --- Selector schemas ---
    79→
    80→export const exactReaderSelectorSchema = z
    81→  .object({
    82→    blockIndex: z.number().int().nonnegative(),
    83→    blockType: z.string(),
    84→    messageId: z.string(),
    85→    strategy: z.literal("exact"),
    86→  })
    87→  .strict();
    88→
    89→export const exactMarkdownSelectorSchema = z
    90→  .object({
    91→    blockIndex: z.number().int().nonnegative(),
    92→    blockType: z.literal("markdown-lines"),
    93→    lineEnd: z.number().int().positive(),
    94→    lineStart: z.number().int().positive(),
    95→    messageId: z.string(),
    96→    strategy: z.literal("exact"),
    97→  })
    98→  .strict();
    99→
   100→export const blockTypeSelectorSchema = z
   101→  .object({
   102→    blockType: z.string(),
   103→    strategy: z.literal("block_type"),
   104→  })
   105→  .strict();
   106→
   107→export const readerPrefixSelectorSchema = z
   108→  .object({
   109→    blockType: z.string(),
   110→    strategy: z.literal("prefix_before_colon"),
   111→  })
   112→  .strict();
   113→
   114→export const markdownPrefixSelectorSchema = z
   115→  .object({
   116→    strategy: z.literal("prefix_before_colon"),
   117→  })
   118→  .strict();
   119→
   120→export const markdownTableSelectorSchema = z
   121→  .object({
   122→    strategy: z.literal("markdown_table"),
   123→  })
   124→  .strict();
   125→
   126→export const readerRuleSelectorSchema = z.union([
   127→  exactReaderSelectorSchema,
   128→  blockTypeSelectorSchema,
   129→  readerPrefixSelectorSchema,
   130→]);
   131→
   132→export const markdownRuleSelectorSchema = z.union([
   133→  exactMarkdownSelectorSchema,
   134→  markdownPrefixSelectorSchema,
   135→  markdownTableSelectorSchema,
   136→]);
   137→
   138→export const ruleSelectorSchema = z.union([
   139→  readerRuleSelectorSchema,
   140→  markdownRuleSelectorSchema,
   141→]);
   142→
   143→// --- Effect schemas ---
   144→
   145→export const adjustBlockSpacingEffectSchema = z.object({
   146→  amount: z.enum(["sm", "md", "lg"]),
   147→  direction: z.literal("after"),
   148→  type: z.literal("adjust_block_spacing"),
   149→});
   150→
   151→export const increaseHeadingEmphasisEffectSchema = z.object({
   152→  amount: z.enum(["sm", "md", "lg"]),
   153→  type: z.literal("increase_heading_emphasis"),
   154→});
   155→
   156→export const refineBlockPresentationEffectSchema = z.object({
   157→  emphasis: z.enum(["balanced", "subtle", "strong"]),
   158→  type: z.literal("refine_selected_block_presentation"),
   159→});
   160→
   161→export const boldPrefixEffectSchema = z.object({
   162→  type: z.literal("bold_prefix_before_colon"),
   163→});
   164→
   165→export const renderMarkdownStrongEffectSchema = z.object({
   166→  type: z.literal("render_markdown_strong"),
   167→});
   168→
   169→export const promoteToHeadingEffectSchema = z.object({
   170→  level: z.number().int().min(1).max(6),
   171→  type: z.literal("promote_to_heading"),
   172→});
   173→
   174→export const normalizeListStructureEffectSchema = z.object({
   175→  type: z.literal("normalize_list_structure"),
   176→});
   177→
   178→export const normalizeMarkdownTableEffectSchema = z.object({
   179→  type: z.literal("normalize_markdown_table"),
   180→});
   181→
   182→export const reshapeMarkdownBlockEffectSchema = z.object({
   183→  type: z.literal("reshape_markdown_block"),
   184→});
   185→
   186→export const customStyleEffectSchema = z.object({
   187→  type: z.literal("custom_style"),
   188→  /** CSS properties applied to the block container element (React style object). */
   189→  containerStyle: z.record(z.string()).optional(),
   190→  /** CSS properties applied to child items (list items, table cells, etc.). */
   191→  itemStyle: z.record(z.string()).optional(),
   192→  /** CSS properties applied to text elements within the block. */
   193→  textStyle: z.record(z.string()).optional(),
   194→  /** Optional text rendering transformation. */
   195→  textTransform: z
   196→    .enum(["bold_prefix_before_colon", "render_markdown_strong"])
   197→    .nullish(),
   198→  /** For markdown view: structural text transformation to apply. */
   199→  markdownTransform: z
   200→    .enum([
   201→      "promote_to_heading",
   202→      "normalize_list_structure",
   203→      "normalize_markdown_table",
   204→      "reshape_markdown_block",
   205→      "bold_prefix_before_colon",
   206→    ])
   207→    .nullish(),
   208→  /** Human-readable description of the visual change. */
   209→  description: z.string().optional(),
   210→  /** Override heading level (1-6) for heading blocks. */
   211→  headingLevel: z.number().int().min(1).max(6).optional(),
   212→  /** Insert an element before the block. */
   213→  insertBefore: z.enum(["hr", "spacer"]).nullish(),
   214→  /** Insert an element after the block. */
   215→  insertAfter: z.enum(["hr", "spacer"]).nullish(),
   216→});
   217→
   218→export const ruleEffectSchema = z.discriminatedUnion("type", [
   219→  adjustBlockSpacingEffectSchema,
   220→  increaseHeadingEmphasisEffectSchema,
   221→  refineBlockPresentationEffectSchema,
   222→  boldPrefixEffectSchema,
   223→  renderMarkdownStrongEffectSchema,
   224→  promoteToHeadingEffectSchema,
   225→  normalizeListStructureEffectSchema,
   226→  normalizeMarkdownTableEffectSchema,
   227→  reshapeMarkdownBlockEffectSchema,
   228→  customStyleEffectSchema,
   229→]);
   230→
   231→// --- Session and rule schemas ---
   232→
   233→export const adjustmentSessionSchema = z.object({
   234→  id: z.string(),
   235→  importId: z.string(),
   236→  targetFormat: adjustmentTargetFormatSchema,
   237→  status: adjustmentSessionStatusSchema,
   238→  selection: adjustmentSelectionSchema,
   239→  createdAt: z.string(),
   240→  updatedAt: z.string(),
   241→});
   242→
   243→export const adjustmentMessageSchema = z.object({
   244→  id: z.string(),
   245→  sessionId: z.string(),
   246→  role: roleSchema,
   247→  content: z.string(),
   248→  createdAt: z.string(),
   249→});
   250→
   251→export const adjustmentSessionDetailSchema = z.object({
   252→  messages: z.array(adjustmentMessageSchema),
   253→  session: adjustmentSessionSchema,
   254→});
   255→
   256→export const formatRuleSchema = z.object({
   257→  id: z.string(),
   258→  importId: z.string().nullable(),
   259→  targetFormat: adjustmentTargetFormatSchema,
   260→  kind: formatRuleKindSchema,
   261→  scope: formatRuleScopeSchema,
   262→  status: formatRuleStatusSchema,
   263→  selector: ruleSelectorSchema,
   264→  instruction: z.string(),
   265→  compiledRule: ruleEffectSchema.optional(),
   266→  sourceSessionId: z.string().optional(),
   267→  createdAt: z.string(),
   268→  updatedAt: z.string(),
   269→});
   270→
   271→export const adjustmentMetricsSchema = z.object({
   272→  counts: z.object({
   273→    clarifications: z.number().int().nonnegative(),
   274→    previewFailures: z.number().int().nonnegative(),
   275→    previewsGenerated: z.number().int().nonnegative(),
   276→    rulesApplied: z.number().int().nonnegative(),
   277→    rulesDisabled: z.number().int().nonnegative(),
   278→    sessionsCreated: z.number().int().nonnegative(),
   279→    sessionsDiscarded: z.number().int().nonnegative(),
   280→  }),
   281→  importId: z.string(),
   282→  targetFormat: adjustmentTargetFormatSchema,
   283→  updatedAt: z.string().nullable(),
   284→});
   285→
   286→export type AdjustmentTargetFormat = z.infer<
   287→  typeof adjustmentTargetFormatSchema
   288→>;
   289→export type AdjustmentSessionStatus = z.infer<
   290→  typeof adjustmentSessionStatusSchema
   291→>;
   292→export type FormatRuleKind = z.infer<typeof formatRuleKindSchema>;
   293→export type FormatRuleScope = z.infer<typeof formatRuleScopeSchema>;
   294→export type FormatRuleStatus = z.infer<typeof formatRuleStatusSchema>;
   295→export type AdjustmentEventType = z.infer<typeof adjustmentEventTypeSchema>;
   296→export type AdjustmentSelection = z.infer<typeof adjustmentSelectionSchema>;
   297→export type CreateAdjustmentSessionRequest = z.infer<
   298→  typeof createAdjustmentSessionRequestSchema
   299→>;
   300→export type AppendAdjustmentMessageRequest = z.infer<
   301→  typeof appendAdjustmentMessageRequestSchema
   302→>;
   303→export type AdjustmentSession = z.infer<typeof adjustmentSessionSchema>;
   304→export type AdjustmentMessage = z.infer<typeof adjustmentMessageSchema>;
   305→export type AdjustmentSessionDetail = z.infer<
   306→  typeof adjustmentSessionDetailSchema
   307→>;
   308→export type FormatRule = z.infer<typeof formatRuleSchema>;
   309→export type AdjustmentMetrics = z.infer<typeof adjustmentMetricsSchema>;
   310→export type RuleSelector = z.infer<typeof ruleSelectorSchema>;
   311→export type RuleEffect = z.infer<typeof ruleEffectSchema>;
   312→export type CustomStyleEffect = z.infer<typeof customStyleEffectSchema>;
   313→
   314→/**
   315→ * Converts legacy effect types into a unified `custom_style` effect.
   316→ * Already-`custom_style` effects are returned as-is.
   317→ */
   318→export function normalizeLegacyEffect(effect: RuleEffect): CustomStyleEffect {
   319→  if (effect.type === "custom_style") {
   320→    return effect;
   321→  }
   322→
   323→  switch (effect.type) {
   324→    case "adjust_block_spacing":
   325→      return {
   326→        type: "custom_style",
   327→        containerStyle: {
   328→          marginBottom:
   329→            effect.amount === "lg"
   330→              ? "2rem"
   331→              : effect.amount === "md"
   332→                ? "1.5rem"
   333→                : "1rem",
   334→        },
   335→      };
   336→    case "increase_heading_emphasis":
   337→      return {
   338→        type: "custom_style",
   339→        textStyle: {
   340→          fontSize:
   341→            effect.amount === "lg"
   342→              ? "1.25rem"
   343→              : effect.amount === "md"
   344→                ? "1.125rem"
   345→                : "1rem",
   346→          fontWeight: "600",
   347→        },
   348→      };
   349→    case "refine_selected_block_presentation":
   350→      return {
   351→        type: "custom_style",
   352→        containerStyle: {
   353→          backgroundColor: "hsl(var(--accent) / 0.08)",
   354→          padding: "0.5rem",
   355→        },
   356→      };
   357→    case "bold_prefix_before_colon":
   358→      return {
   359→        type: "custom_style",
   360→        textTransform: "bold_prefix_before_colon",
   361→        markdownTransform: "bold_prefix_before_colon",
   362→      };
   363→    case "render_markdown_strong":
   364→      return {
   365→        type: "custom_style",
   366→        textTransform: "render_markdown_strong",
   367→      };
   368→    case "promote_to_heading":
   369→      return {
   370→        type: "custom_style",
   371→        markdownTransform: "promote_to_heading",
   372→        headingLevel: effect.level,
   373→      };
   374→    case "normalize_list_structure":
   375→      return {
   376→        type: "custom_style",
   377→        markdownTransform: "normalize_list_structure",
   378→      };
   379→    case "normalize_markdown_table":
   380→      return {
   381→        type: "custom_style",
   382→        markdownTransform: "normalize_markdown_table",
   383→      };
   384→    case "reshape_markdown_block":
   385→      return {
   386→        type: "custom_style",
   387→        markdownTransform: "reshape_markdown_block",
   388→      };
   389→  }
   390→}
   391→

content.text:
Excellent! Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me create a final summary document with all the findings:

## Report: Reader View and Download/Export Functionality

Based on my thorough search of the codebase, here's a comprehensive analysis of the Reader view implementation and download functionality:

---

### **1. Reader View Implementation Files**

#### Core Components:
- **`/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/reader-view.tsx`**
  - Main component that renders the conversation in Reader format
  - Exports `ReaderView` (main component) and `ReaderMessage` (memoized sub-component)
  - Handles message display, block rendering, edit mode, delete/restore functionality
  - Manages adjustment mode selection and highlighting

- **`/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/reader-block-render.tsx`**
  - Rendering engine for Reader blocks
  - Exports `renderReaderBlock()` function that converts Block types to JSX
  - Exports `getReaderBlockClassName()` for conditional styling
  - Exports `getReaderBlockStyle()` for CSS properties from effects
  - Handles special markdown patterns (bold prefixes, heading detection)
  - Supports all block types: paragraph, heading, list, quote, code, table

#### Integration Points:
- **`/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/format-workspace.tsx`** (lines 276-294)
  - Orchestrates Reader view rendering (line 419-446)
  - Defines download handler for Reader view (lines 276-294)

- **`/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/completed-toolbar.tsx`** (lines 178-193)
  - Edit mode toggle specific to Reader view
  - Download button with icon and label

---

### **2. Reader View Styling**

**CSS Classes Used:**

From `reader-block-render.tsx`:
- **Container styling:** `rounded-2xl px-3 py-2 transition`
- **Interactive mode:** `cursor-pointer ring-1 ring-transparent hover:bg-primary/5 hover:ring-primary/20`
- **Highlighted blocks:** `bg-primary/8 ring-1 ring-primary/20`
- **Selected blocks:** `bg-primary/8 ring-2 ring-primary/40`

From `reader-view.tsx`:
- **Message article:** `rounded-[1.55rem] border border-border/80 px-4 py-5 sm:px-5`
- **User messages:** `bg-secondary/30`
- **Assistant messages:** `bg-card/92`
- **Deleted message state:** `opacity-50`

**Global Theme Variables** (`/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/styles/globals.css`):
- Tailwind CSS v4 with CSS custom properties
- Color scheme: light mode
- Main palette: teal/green primary, orange accent, beige background
- Font: IBM Plex Sans (body), JetBrains Mono (code)

**Block-Type-Specific Styles** (from `reader-block-render.tsx`):
- **Paragraph:** `text-sm leading-7 text-foreground/90`
- **Heading:** `font-semibold text-foreground` (dynamically sized h1-h6)
- **Lists:** `list-disc space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-7 text-foreground/90`
- **Quotes:** `border-l-2 border-accent pl-4 text-sm italic leading-7 text-foreground/80`
- **Code blocks:** `rounded-2xl border border-border/80 bg-zinc-950 p-4 text-sm text-zinc-100`
  - Includes language label with uppercase tracking
  - Monospace font, wrap text
- **Tables:** `min-w-full text-left text-sm` with hover states and borders

---

### **3. Reader Download/Export Functionality**

#### Download Handler Location:
**`/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/format-workspace.tsx` (lines 262-311)**

#### How Reader Download Works:

```typescript
// Lines 276-294: Reader view download
if (view === "reader" && resolvedConversation) {
  return () => {
    const html = resolvedConversation.messages
      .map((m) =>
        m.blocks
          .map((b) => ("text" in b ? b.text : JSON.stringify(b)))
          .join("\n"),
      )
      .join("\n\n---\n\n");
    const blob = new Blob([html], { type: "text/plain" });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `export-${job.id}.txt`;
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 100);
  };
}
```

#### Export Format Details:

**Reader Download:**
- **File format:** `.txt` (plain text)
- **File name:** `export-{jobId}.txt`
- **Content structure:**
  - Messages joined by `\n\n---\n\n` separator
  - Within each message, blocks are joined by `\n`
  - For text-containing blocks: raw text
  - For non-text blocks: JSON stringified
- **MIME type:** `text/plain`

#### Other View Downloads (for comparison):
- **Markdown:** `.md` (text/markdown) — applies format rules via `applyMarkdownRules()`
- **Handover/JSON:** `.md` or `.json` (text/plain) — raw artifact from server
- **Common mechanism:** Blob creation, temporary object URL, synthetic anchor element click

#### Download Trigger:
- Button in toolbar: `onDownloadMarkdown` callback (completedToolbar.tsx line 84-106)
- Triggered when user clicks "Herunterladen" (Download) button
- Only enabled when content is available

#### View Modes Available:
From `labels.ts`:
- `reader` → "Reader"
- `markdown` → "Markdown"
- `handover` → "Übergabe"
- `json` → "JSON"

---

### **4. Design Architecture Notes**

**Editor vs. Viewer States:**
- Reader supports **edit mode** (toggled in toolbar, line 178-193)
- In edit mode: block inserter, toolbar, drag-to-reorder, type-change
- In view mode: display-only, no editing controls

**Adjustment Mode Integration:**
- Reader blocks are **selectable** when adjustment mode enabled
- Selection captures: messageId, blockIndex, selectedText, viewport anchor
- Rules are applied via `buildReaderEffectsMap()` (line 243-248 in format-workspace.tsx)
- Effects map includes styling, text transforms, spacing, heading level overrides

**Message Deletion:**
- Deleted messages shown with opacity-50 and red banner
- Can be restored or permanently deleted
- Round deletion removes all messages in conversation turn

---

### **5. File Path Summary**

**Reader View Components:**
- `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/reader-view.tsx`
- `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/reader-block-render.tsx`

**Styling References:**
- `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/styles/globals.css` (theme + typography)
- Inline Tailwind classes in TSX files

**Download Functionality:**
- `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/format-workspace.tsx` (handler + button integration)
- `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/completed-toolbar.tsx` (UI)
- `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/labels.ts` (label strings)

**Type Definitions:**
- `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/types.ts` (ViewMode, EditMode)
- `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/packages/shared/src/adjustments.ts` (AdjustmentTargetFormat enum)
- `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/packages/shared/src/conversation.ts` (Block, Message schemas)

toolUseResult.prompt:
Find all code related to:
1. The "Reader" view/component - how it renders conversations visually (look for reader-related components, styles, CSS)
2. The Reader download/export functionality - how the download is triggered and what format it produces

Search thoroughly in apps/web/src/ for anything related to "reader", "download", "export". Also check for format types and export handlers.

Report:
- Which files implement the Reader view and its styling
- Which files handle the Reader download
- How the download currently works (what format, what content)
- What CSS/styles are used in the Reader view

content.content:
1→import type {
     2→  FormatRule,
     3→  FormatRuleKind,
     4→  ImportStage,
     5→} from "@chat-exporter/shared";
     6→
     7→import type { ViewMode } from "@/components/format-workspace/types";
     8→
     9→const viewLabels: Record<ViewMode, string> = {
    10→  reader: "Reader",
    11→  markdown: "Markdown",
    12→  handover: "Übergabe",
    13→  json: "JSON",
    14→};
    15→
    16→const roleLabels: Record<string, string> = {
    17→  assistant: "Assistent",
    18→  markdown: "Markdown",
    19→  system: "System",
    20→  tool: "Werkzeug",
    21→  user: "Nutzer",
    22→};
    23→
    24→const blockTypeLabels: Record<string, string> = {
    25→  code: "Codeblock",
    26→  heading: "Überschrift",
    27→  list: "Liste",
    28→  "markdown-lines": "Markdown-Zeilen",
    29→  paragraph: "Absatz",
    30→  quote: "Zitat",
    31→  table: "Tabelle",
    32→};
    33→
    34→const ruleKindLabels: Record<FormatRuleKind, string> = {
    35→  clipboard: "Zwischenablage",
    36→  export_profile: "Export-Profil",
    37→  inline_semantics: "Inline-Semantik",
    38→  render: "Darstellung",
    39→  structure: "Struktur",
    40→};
    41→
    42→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    43→// Job Status Labels
    44→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    45→
    46→const jobStatusLabels: Record<string, string> = {
    47→  completed: "Bereit",
    48→  failed: "Fehlgeschlagen",
    49→  queued: "Warteschlange",
    50→  processing: "Import läuft",
    51→};
    52→
    53→export function getJobStatusLabel(status: string) {
    54→  return jobStatusLabels[status] ?? jobStatusLabels.processing;
    55→}
    56→
    57→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    58→// Import Stage Labels
    59→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    60→
    61→const importStageLabels: Record<
    62→  ImportStage | "queued",
    63→  { label: string; detail: string }
    64→> = {
    65→  queued: {
    66→    label: "Wartet auf Start",
    67→    detail:
    68→      "Der Job ist in der Warteschlange und startet, sobald ein Worker frei ist.",
    69→  },
    70→  validate: {
    71→    label: "Link wird geprüft",
    72→    detail: "Der Link wird geprüft und dem passenden Importer zugeordnet.",
    73→  },
    74→  fetch: {
    75→    label: "Seite wird geladen",
    76→    detail: "Die freigegebene Seite wird geöffnet und als Quelle erfasst.",
    77→  },
    78→  extract: {
    79→    label: "Nachrichten werden extrahiert",
    80→    detail: "Die Unterhaltung wird aus dem Markup des Anbieters extrahiert.",
    81→  },
    82→  normalize: {
    83→    label: "Transkript wird bereinigt",
    84→    detail: "Rohfragmente werden in lesbare Nachrichten umgewandelt.",
    85→  },
    86→  structure: {
    87→    label: "Struktur wird repariert",
    88→    detail: "Abschnitte mit zusätzlichem Bereinigungsbedarf werden korrigiert.",
    89→  },
    90→  render: {
    91→    label: "Ausgaben werden erzeugt",
    92→    detail: "Reader- und Exportformate werden vorbereitet.",
    93→  },
    94→  done: {
    95→    label: "Bereit",
    96→    detail: "Das Transkript ist bereit.",
    97→  },
    98→};
    99→
   100→export function getImportStageLabel(stage: ImportStage | "queued") {
   101→  return importStageLabels[stage]?.label ?? stage;
   102→}
   103→
   104→export function getImportStageDescription(stage: ImportStage | "queued") {
   105→  return importStageLabels[stage]?.detail ?? "";
   106→}
   107→
   108→export function getImportStageEntry(stage: ImportStage | "queued") {
   109→  return importStageLabels[stage] ?? { label: stage, detail: "" };
   110→}
   111→
   112→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   113→// Adjustment UI Labels
   114→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   115→
   116→export const adjustmentLabels = {
   117→  // Button labels
   118→  send: "Senden",
   119→  sendPending: "Wird gesendet...",
   120→  cancel: "Abbrechen",
   121→  discard: "Verwerfen",
   122→  dismiss: "Verstanden",
   123→  download: "Download",
   124→
   125→  // Placeholders
   126→  adjustmentPlaceholder: "Beschreibe kurz, wie diese Stelle aussehen soll.",
   127→  followUpPlaceholder: "Noch etwas anpassen?",
   128→
   129→  // Messages
   130→  loadingMessage: "Ich bereite diese Stelle gerade für die Anpassung vor.",
   131→  appliedHint:
   132→    "Die Änderung ist schon sichtbar. Du kannst weiter anpassen oder eine neue Stelle markieren.",
   133→  defaultHint:
   134→    "Die KI antwortet kurz und setzt klare Änderungen sofort direkt in dieser Ansicht um.",
   135→  closeLabel: "Anpassung schließen",
   136→  createRuleLabel: "Regel erstellen",
   137→  inputLabel: "Anpassungsanfrage",
   138→
   139→  // Guide
   140→  guideInstruction:
   141→    "Markiere die Stelle, die anders aussehen soll. Beschreibe dann kurz deinen Wunsch, und die Änderung erscheint direkt hier.",
   142→  guideNote: "Du musst kein Regel-JSON lesen oder eine Vorschau vergleichen.",
   143→
   144→  // Mode toggle
   145→  endAdjustMode: "Anpassungsmodus beenden",
   146→
   147→  // Edit mode
   148→  edit: "Bearbeiten",
   149→  endEdit: "Bearbeitung beenden",
   150→
   151→  // Clipboard
   152→  copied: "Kopiert!",
   153→
   154→  // Toolbar actions
   155→  versions: "Versionen",
   156→  downloadAction: "Herunterladen",
   157→} as const;
   158→
   159→export function getAdjustViewLabel(view: ViewMode) {
   160→  return `${getViewLabel(view)} anpassen`;
   161→}
   162→
   163→export function getEndAdjustLabel() {
   164→  return adjustmentLabels.endAdjustMode;
   165→}
   166→
   167→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   168→// View Labels
   169→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   170→
   171→export function getViewLabel(view: ViewMode) {
   172→  return viewLabels[view];
   173→}
   174→
   175→export function getRoleLabel(role: string) {
   176→  return roleLabels[role] ?? role;
   177→}
   178→
   179→export function getBlockTypeLabel(blockType: string) {
   180→  return blockTypeLabels[blockType] ?? blockType;
   181→}
   182→
   183→export function getRuleKindLabel(kind: FormatRuleKind) {
   184→  return ruleKindLabels[kind];
   185→}
   186→
   187→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   188→// Selection Formatter
   189→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   190→
   191→export function formatMarkdownLinesLabel(start: number, end: number) {
   192→  return `Markdown-Zeilen ${start}-${end}`;
   193→}
   194→
   195→export function formatMessageBlockLabel(
   196→  role: string,
   197→  index: number,
   198→  blockType: string,
   199→) {
   200→  return `${getRoleLabel(role)}-Nachricht ${index} · ${getBlockTypeLabel(blockType)}`;
   201→}
   202→
   203→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   204→// Rules Labels
   205→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   206→
   207→export const rulesLabels = {
   208→  activeRulesCount: (count: number) =>
   209→    count > 0 ? `${count} ${count === 1 ? "Regel" : "Regeln"} aktiv` : "Regeln",
   210→  noActiveRules: "Keine aktiven Regeln.",
   211→  allImports: "Für alle Imports",
   212→  thisImportOnly: "Nur dieser Import",
   213→  loading: "Wird geladen...",
   214→  rationale: "Begründung",
   215→  defaultRationale:
   216→    "Diese Regel wurde aus einer früheren Anpassungssession für diesen Import erzeugt.",
   217→  exactScopeNote: "Diese Regel gilt nur für die ursprüngliche Auswahl.",
   218→  globalScopeNote: "Diese Regel gilt für alle Imports in diesem Format.",
   219→  undoPending: "Wird rückgängig gemacht...",
   220→  undo: "Rückgängig",
   221→} as const;
   222→
   223→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   224→// Loading & Misc Labels
   225→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   226→
   227→export const miscLabels = {
   228→  transcriptLoading: "Transkript wird vorbereitet",
   229→  importFailed: "Import fehlgeschlagen",
   230→  errorInPhase: (phase: string) => `Fehler in Phase: ${phase}`,
   231→  viewLoadError: "Diese Ansicht konnte nicht geladen werden.",
   232→  retryButton: "Erneut versuchen",
   233→  adjustmentLoadError: "Anpassungen konnten nicht geladen werden.",
   234→} as const;
   235→
   236→export function getRuleLabel(rule: FormatRule) {
   237→  const summary = rule.instruction.trim();
   238→
   239→  if (summary.length <= 72) {
   240→    return summary;
   241→  }
   242→
   243→  return `${summary.slice(0, 69).trimEnd()}...`;
   244→}
   245→

content.text:
Fertig. Hier die Zusammenfassung der Änderungen:

**Neue Datei:** `reader-html-export.ts` — generiert eine standalone HTML-Datei mit:
- Eingebettetes CSS das die Reader-Ansicht 1:1 nachbildet (Farben, Typografie, Abstände, Border-Radii)
- Google Fonts Import für IBM Plex Sans + JetBrains Mono
- Alle Block-Typen: Paragraph, Heading, List, Quote, Code, Table
- Markdown-Bold-Rendering (`**text**` → `<strong>`)
- Custom-Style-Effects aus dem Effects-Map
- Responsive Layout mit `max-width: 48rem`

**Geänderte Datei:** `format-workspace.tsx` — Reader-Download erzeugt jetzt:
- `.html` statt `.txt`
- `text/html` statt `text/plain`
- Nutzt `buildReaderHtml()` mit Conversation, Effects-Map und Titel
